code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CurrencyContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext();const RATES={INR:1,USD:1/83.5,EUR:1/89.5};const SYMBOLS={INR:"₹",USD:"$",EUR:"€"};export function CurrencyProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[currency,setCurrencyState]=useState(()=>{return localStorage.getItem("spendsphere_currency")||"INR";});useEffect(()=>{localStorage.setItem("spendsphere_currency",currency);},[currency]);const fmt=n=>{const converted=n*RATES[currency];return SYMBOLS[currency]+Math.abs(converted).toLocaleString("en-US",{maximumFractionDigits:2});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CurrencyContext.Provider,{value:{currency,setCurrency:setCurrencyState,fmt},children:children});}export function useCurrency(){return useContext(CurrencyContext);}
